lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior are in pristine condition with no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are fully functional.

Looking for a project that you can truly make your own? This car is a fantastic opportunity for someone handy with a wrench! While it currently needs significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it's a great way to get into a vehicle at a very low price point. Perfect for a dedicated DIYer or as a source for parts—bring your trailer and your vision to turn this into your next weekend project!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional, reliable option for daily transportation. The exterior has visible signs of wear, including some paint fading on the hood and several small scuffs around the bumpers. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows noticeable wear on the driver's seat and carpet. Mechanically, the car runs and drives well, though the suspension is beginning to feel a bit soft and it may require a tune-up soon to maintain its performance. It is a straightforward vehicle that has been driven regularly and priced according to its current state.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant attention to be roadworthy. The exterior shows substantial wear, including several large dents, visible rust along the wheel wells and rocker panels, and heavily faded paint with clear coat failure on the hood and roof. Inside, the upholstery is torn in multiple places, the headliner is sagging, and several electronic components, including the radio and the passenger-side power window, are non-functional. Mechanically, while the car starts, it has a noticeable engine knock, a leaking transmission, and needs a complete exhaust system replacement. This vehicle is being sold strictly as-is and is best suited as a project car for a dedicated mechanic or as a source for parts.
The car is in mint condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are in perfect working order.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure consistent performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional who values both quality and value.

Hey there! Are you looking for your next favorite ride? I'm parting with my trusty car, and it has been such a joy to drive! It’s in really nice shape and has been super well-cared for, making it perfect for someone who wants a reliable, stylish vehicle without the brand-new price tag. It runs smoothly and is totally ready to hit the road with its new owner today. Come take it for a spin—I just know you’re going to love it!
This E46 M3 is a mechanically robust example of the legendary S54-powered platform. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Runs well. Solid interior.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor signs of road use typical for its age, such as small stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free; the premium leather seats remain supple with only light bolster wear on the driver's side. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound, having undergone a recent multi-point inspection and oil service. It shifts smoothly and provides a quiet, composed ride on the highway. Included are a full set of floor mats and a detailed service history log. This is a solid, dependable example ready for its next owner.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to a high standard of mechanical and aesthetic preservation. It offers a refined driving experience characterized by reliable performance and a well-appointed interior. This offering represents a sophisticated acquisition for the individual seeking a dependable, high-caliber vehicle that balances long-term utility with exceptional value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior, it delivers a consistent and sophisticated driving experience. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal ensure it remains a distinguished choice within its class, offering exceptional value and reliable performance.

Hey! Check out this absolute gem! 🚗 It's been such a reliable companion for me and is still looking great and running smoothly. I’ve made sure to keep up with all the regular maintenance, so it’s totally ready for your next big road trip or just the daily commute. Honestly, it’s a fantastic ride that still has so much life left in it—you’re going to love how it handles! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and modern comfort. The exterior features a brilliant metallic finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only the slight, honest character marks of a well-cared-for daily driver. Step inside to a pristine, smoke-free interior where the premium upholstery remains firm and supportive, complemented by a suite of fully functional electronics and a dual-zone climate control system that keeps the cabin perfectly tempered. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and preventative maintenance. With a set of high-tread tires and recently serviced brakes, this car delivers a confident, responsive driving experience. It is a solid, dependable choice for anyone seeking a high-quality pre-owned vehicle that is ready for many more miles of adventure.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophisticated engineering. This exceptional example has undergone a rigorous inspection process to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, this automobile represents a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a balanced combination of luxury and value. We invite you to experience the superior road presence and performance of this distinguished motorcar.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it presents in commendable condition, reflecting a history of consistent care and mechanical integrity. Ideal for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, premium driving experience without the new-car premium, this vehicle offers both longevity and prestige. We invite you to experience the refined handling and sophisticated interior of this standout example.

Hey everyone! 🚗 I’m looking for a new home for my trusty ride. It’s in wonderful shape and has been so reliable for me. I’ve taken really good care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road with you today! It drives like a dream and is super comfy. Drop me a message if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 represents a mechanically robust example of the high-revving S54 platform. The 3.2L inline-six features individual throttle bodies and a recently serviced VANOS system, ensuring optimal variable valve timing and throttle response. Power is routed through a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock. Crucially, the rear subframe has been reinforced to mitigate common floor pan fatigue, and the suspension retains its factory-spec handling characteristics with refreshed bushings. While the exterior displays minor age-consistent patina, the
Clean title. Runs well. Minor cosmetic wear. Regular maintenance performed. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor cosmetic blemishes consistent with careful, regular use. Inside, the cabin remains a clean and inviting space; the premium upholstery shows minimal wear, and all integrated technology—including the climate control and infotainment system—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from a documented history of professional servicing. Recent maintenance includes a fresh set of tires and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. Whether you are looking for a reliable daily commuter or a capable weekend cruiser, this car delivers a refined driving experience that belies its age. Complete service records and both sets of keys are included.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent care and a robust service history, the automobile offers a refined driving experience and reliable mechanical performance. The interior cabin remains well-preserved, while the exterior maintains a sophisticated presence. This offering provides a superior balance of luxury and proven longevity, ideal for those who demand quality without compromise.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that balances performance with enduring value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure mechanical excellence and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the pragmatic professional. An exemplary choice for those seeking reliability without compromise.

Hey! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in solid shape and has plenty of life left in it—perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that still looks great on the road. It runs super smooth and has been well-loved, so it's ready for its next adventure. I'd love for it to go to a good home where it'll be appreciated just as much as I've enjoyed it! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable engine. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like shine, showing only the minor road wear expected from careful daily use. Inside, the cabin is a testament to pride of ownership; the premium upholstery is supple and free of tears, while all technological features and climate controls function exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is sound, offering a smooth and responsive driving experience backed by a comprehensive service history. It has recently undergone a full multi-point inspection and fluid service, ensuring it is ready for the road ahead. Whether you are looking for a reliable commuter or a comfortable weekend cruiser, this car delivers exceptional value and performance.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist seeking a harmonious balance of performance and sustained reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior mechanical order, it offers a refined driving experience consistent with our dealership’s rigorous standards for quality. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure continued excellence on the road, making this an exemplary choice for those who demand both value and prestige.
